rule_metadata.name: MetaStealer
rule_metadata.author: RussianPanda
rule_metadata.decription: Detects the old version of MetaStealer 11-2023

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule MetaStealer
{
	meta:
		author = "RussianPanda"
		decription = "Detects the old version of MetaStealer 11-2023"
		date = "11/16/2023"

	strings:
		$s1 = "FileScannerRule"
		$s2 = "MSObject"
		$s3 = "MSValue"
		$s4 = "GetBrowsers"
		$s5 = "Biohazard"

	condition:
		4 of ( $s* ) and pe.imports ( "mscoree.dll" )
}
